ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the reaction */,
  "reactants" TEXT /* Reactants of the reaction */,
  "products" TEXT /* Products of the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., irreversible, reversible) */,
  "catalyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme that catalyzes the reaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reaction was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reaction */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme */,
  "uniprotkb_ac" TEXT /* UniProtKB AC of the enzyme */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism the enzyme belongs to */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name of the enzyme */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Protein sequence of the enzyme */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Structure of the enzyme (e.g., 3D model) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the enzyme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the enzyme was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the enzyme */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the enzyme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the condition applies to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the reaction occurs */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the reaction occurs */,
  "buffer" TEXT /* Buffer used in the reaction */,
  "ionic_strength" REAL /* Ionic strength of the reaction */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the reaction occurs */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_conditions_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzyme_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme the variant belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the variant */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Structure of the variant (e.g., 3D model) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the variant was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variant */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kinetic_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the parameter applies to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., Km, kcat) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinetic_parameters_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activators" (
  "activator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activator */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the activator applies to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the activator */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the activator */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the activator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activator was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the activator */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activators_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inhibitors" (
  "inhibitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inhibitor */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the inhibitor applies to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the inhibitor */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the inhibitor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the inhibitor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the inhibitor was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the inhibitor */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the inhibitor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inhibitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inhibitors_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cofactors" (
  "cofactor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cofactor */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the cofactor applies to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cofactor */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the cofactor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cofactor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cofactor was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the cofactor */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cofactor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cofactor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cofactors_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the publication applies to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the publication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the publication was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the publication */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the database */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the comment applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_comments_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the tag applies to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_tags_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., reactions, enzymes, kinetic parameters) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES reaction_datasets ("dataset")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the dataset applies to */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset text */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_datasets_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)
